# x402 Trust Layer

> 31 paid x402 trust infrastructure APIs for AI agent fleets. Guard, attest, comply and audit every payment — before the money moves.

- Website: https://x402trustlayer.xyz
- OpenAPI: https://x402trustlayer.xyz/openapi.json
- Discovery: https://x402trustlayer.xyz/.well-known/x402
- Services manifest: https://x402trustlayer.xyz/x402/api/services.json
- GitHub: https://github.com/mimranchohan/x402-agent-suite

## Primary entry points

| Method | Path | Price | Purpose |
|--------|------|-------|---------|
| POST | /api/x402/proxy | $0.08 | All-in-one preflight before any external x402 payment |
| POST | /api/guard/pre-x402 | $0.05 | Spend + identity + risk gate bundle |
| POST | /api/pipeline/execute | $0.25 | Full orchestration for multi-step agent tasks |

## Tier-1 enterprise agents

| Method | Path | Price | Purpose |
|--------|------|-------|---------|
| POST | /api/merchant-trust/score | $0.06 | Know-Your-Merchant trust score before payment |
| POST | /api/mandate/compile | $0.08 | AP2-style signed payment mandate from intent |
| POST | /api/mandate/verify | $0.02 | Verify mandate scope for a proposed payment |
| POST | /api/rail-optimizer/route | $0.04 | Cross-rail routing (Visa CLI, MPP, Base, Solana) |
| POST | /api/compliance/ledger | $0.12 | CFO/SOC2 spend reconciliation ledger |
| POST | /api/dispute/resolve | $0.10 | Visa chargeback or on-chain refund dossier |
| POST | /api/quality-escrow/settle | $0.10 | Quality-gated escrow with auto-refund |

## Agentic Market validate URLs

Paste each resource URL at https://agentic.market/ (Validate Endpoint):

```
GET https://x402trustlayer.xyz/api/agentic/validate-urls
```

Returns all 31 canonical paid resource URLs for one-click listing.

## Networks

Base (eip155:8453) and Solana — USDC via Dexter facilitator.
